---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug or issue with the scanner
title: '[BUG] '
labels: ['bug', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Report

### **Bug Type**
- [ ] Crash/Exception
- [ ] Incorrect Detection (False Positive)
- [ ] Missed Detection (False Negative)
- [ ] Performance Issue
- [ ] UI/UX Issue
- [ ] Documentation Issue
- [ ] Other: ___________

### **Severity Assessment**
- [ ] Critical - Scanner unusable
- [ ] High - Major functionality broken
- [ ] Medium - Feature partially broken
- [ ] Low - Minor inconvenience

### **Environment Information**

**Operating System:**
- [ ] Windows
- [ ] macOS
- [ ] Linux
- [ ] Other: ___________

**Rust Version:**
```bash
rustc --version
```

**Scanner Version:**
```bash
stellar-scanner --version
```

**Installation Method:**
- [ ] Cargo install
- [ ] Built from source
- [ ] Binary download
- [ ] Docker container

### **Bug Description**

**What happened?**
<!-- Describe the bug in detail -->

**What should have happened?**
<!-- Describe the expected behavior -->

**How often does this happen?**
- [ ] Every time
- [ ] Sometimes
- [ ] Rarely
- [ ] Only with specific conditions

### **Steps to Reproduce**

**Minimal Reproducible Example:**
<!-- Provide step-by-step instructions to reproduce the bug -->

1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. Step 3

**Command Used:**
```bash
# Command that triggered the bug
stellar-scanner scan --path ./example
```

**Input Files:**
<!-- If applicable, provide the files that trigger the bug -->
- File 1: [link or content]
- File 2: [link or content]

**Configuration:**
<!-- If applicable, provide configuration used -->
```toml
# Configuration file content
```

### **Actual Behavior**

**Console Output:**
<!-- Paste the full console output -->
```
Paste output here
```

**Error Messages:**
<!-- Paste any error messages -->
```
Paste error messages here
```

**Log Files:**
<!-- If applicable, provide log files -->

### **Expected Behavior**

**What should have happened instead?**

**Correct Output:**
<!-- Show what the output should have been -->
```
Expected output here
```

### **Additional Context**

**When did this start happening?**
<!-- First occurrence, after update, etc. -->

**Has this worked before?**
- [ ] Yes, it worked in version X.X.X
- [ ] No, this is a new installation
- [ ] Not sure

**Recent Changes:**
<!-- Any recent changes to system, dependencies, etc. -->

**Workarounds:**
<!-- Any temporary workarounds you've found -->

### **Impact Assessment**

**How does this affect your workflow?**
- [ ] Blocks all work
- [ ] Significant impact
- [ ] Minor inconvenience
- [ ] Cosmetic issue

**How many users are affected?**
- [ ] All users
- [ ] Many users
- [ ] Few users
- [ ] Just me

3. Attempt 3 and result

**Additional Tests:**

**Hypotheses:**
<!-- What you think might be causing the issue -->

### **Fix Proposal**

**Suggested Fix:**
<!-- If you have an idea how to fix this -->

**Code Changes:**
<!-- If you've identified the code that needs changing -->

**Test Cases:**
<!-- Test cases that would verify the fix -->

### **Work Estimate**

**Complexity Assessment:**
- **Technical Complexity**: Low/Medium/High
- **Testing Required**: Low/Medium/High
- **Risk Level**: Low/Medium/High

**Time Estimate:**
- Investigation: ___ hours
- Fix implementation: ___ hours
- Testing: ___ hours
- Documentation: ___ hours
- **Total Hours**: ___

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have read the contribution guidelines
- [ ] I have searched for existing similar bug reports
- [ ] I have provided a clear description of the bug
- [ ] I have included steps to reproduce
- [ ] I have provided environment information
- [ ] I have included relevant logs/error messages
- [ ] I have assessed the impact and severity
- [ ] I am available to provide additional information

---

**Thank you for reporting this bug! Your report helps improve the Stellar Security Scanner for everyone. 🐛**
